list.vod_blurb: &nbsp;A diverse group of tourists on an organized trip to Lisbon find themselves investigating a mur
list.vod_content: A diverse group of tourists on an organized trip to Lisbon find themselves investigating a murder after one of them is killed on the first morning. Set out to find the killer among the group as they visit beautiful Lisbon sites.
